# blueSteel Repository

This repository contains research, bibliography, code, analyses, and documentation related to steelhead ecology, migration, conservation, telemetry, climate impacts, and marine survival.

# Repository Organization

## bibliography/
Literature review and paper summaries.

- bibliography.md contains human-readable summaries
- papers/ contains PDFs
- metadata/papers.yaml contains structured metadata
- templates/ contains reusable entry templates

## telemetry/
Telemetry processing and movement analysis.

## migration-models/
Migration and survival modeling.

## climate/
Climate and ocean condition analyses.

## notebooks/
Exploratory analyses and figures.

# Bibliography Rules

Each bibliography entry should contain:

1. Full citation
2. DOI link
3. Concise methods/findings summary
4. Relative PDF link

Focus especially on:
- marine survival
- thermal ecology
- telemetry
- kelts
- climate impacts
- interspecific competition
- migration ecology

Avoid overstating conclusions.

# PDF Naming Convention

Author_Year_Journal.pdf
